snippet.title: SHAHRAH - Ebi & Shahin Najafi
snippet.description:
In the middle of the city, in the heart of the night
One by one, we faded in hand to hand fights
At the final dinner, where the table was stained with blood
Tell my mother she shouldn’t wait for me anymore

Let my voice be the balm on the wounds of these streets
If I’m gone, pass my place to the next in line
Lay my medals at the feet of these fearless souls
Tell them what courage these children of the 2000s had

We know that hopelessness is a mistake
We stay on this path, because it’s the main road
We sing this anthem with one united voice
Together, we will build the Iran of tomorrow

The silence of the night was shattered with you
The anthem of life was written with you
Blessed are we who live long enough
To sacrifice our lives just like you

Breath by breath, our chests are filling up
In the end, the cage will finally break
Let mothers one day tell
The story of this battle in their tales

We know that hopelessness is a mistake
We stay on this path, because it’s the main road
We sing this anthem with one united voice
Together, we will build the Iran of tomorrow

If all this fear was born in my mind
I gave you everything you'll ever bе

You drain the life out of me 'til I don't know myself
When all your faith in reality fades away
Who will you follow then?

I feel the changes, a crack in the Matrix
Break through the lies like an axe through the screen
You can't stop desire (can't stop desire)
We are the fire

Wake up to the madness
The rats in the wall are already coming through
Lift this twisted veil from our eyes
Forever and ever

What have you done to me?
You drain the life out of me 'til I don't know myself
When all your faith in reality fades away
Who will you follow then?

You drain the life out of me 'til I don't know myself
When all your faith in reality fades away, ah
Who will you follow?

snippet.description: Get a look at the Reveal Trailer for Open Waters, a first-person ocean survival horror game developed by FluffyGameDev. Players will find themselves stranded in a small boat with nothing but water on the horizon. Navigate while coasting the waves, look out for creatures below, and make it to safety. Open Waters is coming soon to PC (Steam).

snippet.title: Wildwood – Official Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
There are places you don’t go.
 
One choice changes everything. Watch the Teaser Trailer for Wildwood now, and see the movie in theatres everywhere October 23.

From the makers of Coraline, Wildwood is a sweeping, darkly magical adventure about a young girl who ventures into a dangerous hidden forest to rescue her brother – an odyssey shaped by love, power, and the courage to confront the unknown. 
 
Sign up to be first in line for tickets and new experiences at https://wildwoodmovie.com.

snippet.title: The Hawk | Official Teaser | Netflix
snippet.description:
Get ready fore the return of an icon. The Hawk, a new Netflix comedy series starring Will Ferrell, debuts July 16, only on Netflix.

Lonnie Hawkins, (Will Ferrell) 2004's number one golfer, struggles on the back nine of his career to recapture his magic. His body says retire, but his heart says he's not done yet. His ex-wife and his son Lance, golf's new golden boy, know he's through. But with one more major to win to complete golf's Grand Slam, Lonnie refuses to believe he's anything other than one stroke away from the greatest comeback in golf history.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81695312

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time.
